rationale: Section 29.457 provides a per-ADA state allotment for alleged offender residents, independent of property tax values or homestead exemption amounts. No operative overlap exists.
quote: each district in which alleged offender residents attend school is entitled to an annual allotment of $5,100 for each resident in average daily attendance
_note: No conflict; §29.457 funding is ADA-based and unaffected by homestead exemption levels.
